label_verbatim: (Name of Corporation in Jurisdiction of Incorporation)
rationale: Foreign corporation's legal name in its home jurisdiction. Same key as foreign-qualification forms (MLLC-12, MLPA-12A).

label_verbatim: FIRST: …the name it proposes to use in the State of Maine
rationale: Optional new name for the corporation upon domestication into Maine. Required only if the true corporate name is unavailable or the corporation desires to change its name. Distinct from `entity.name` because the domestication is the moment the entity becomes a Maine domestic — there's no prior `entity.name`.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The corporation was originally incorporated in ___ (state or country)
rationale: State or country of original incorporation.

label_verbatim: and the original date of incorporation was ___
rationale: Date of original formation in the home jurisdiction.

label_verbatim: THIRD: All the statements required to be set forth in Articles of Incorporation (Form MBCA-6-1) are attached as Exhibit ___
rationale: Inline exhibit letter referencing the attached Articles of Incorporation (Form MBCA-6-1) — required for every domestication filing.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The effective date of the articles of domestication (if other than the date of filing)
rationale: Optional future effective date. If blank, the filing date applies. Same shape as conversion.future_effective_date / merger.future_effective_date.

label_verbatim: DATED ___
*By (signature of an officer or other duly authorized representative) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name + capacity signer widget. Shape D (matches MBCA-11 / MBCA-21 / MLLC-12).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
label_verbatim: Name of entity [2]
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 (likely the bundled MBCA-6-1 entity name for SOS routing).
